data.description:
# Harden the gate machinery (private imports, step-id literals, signature-gate seam)

## What
- Promote `completion.py`'s `_child_closure_findings`/`_deterministic_child_failure`/`_reconcile` (imported by `gate_ops.py:50,117`) to public names + `__all__` (a mandatory gate depends on privates).
- Replace `gate_dispatch.py` step-id string literals (`:153-154,241-242,286-287,309`) with constants validated against the loaded gate YAML at dispatch (a renamed step silently degrades a recoverable run to INDETERMINATE).
- Route the signature close gate's flag resolution out of the locked write core (`txn.py:261-315`) through the shared `_commands/gates.py` seam (with a fail-closed direction), leaving only the in-lock check.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The three completion helpers are public; `gate_ops.py` imports the public names; tests updated.
- [ ] Step-id constants exist and a test proves a missing/renamed step is caught (not silently degraded).
- [ ] Signature-gate flag resolution uses the gates seam; behavior (fail-closed) preserved by tests.
- [ ] `make lint` + gate suites pass; commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
data.title: Harden the gate machinery (private imports, step-id literals, signature-gate seam)
